description: A critical security vulnerability (CVE-2026-9912) has been discovered in 'Tridium JACE 8000' building management controllers. Using the details in the security bulletin at /home/ga/Desktop/security_bulletin_cve_2026.txt, identify all active, owned (non-leased) units of this model in the system. For each eligible asset, create a work order with the description 'Firmware Upgrade - CVE-2026-9912', priority 'Critical', and planned date '2026-06-15'. Do not create work orders for leased units, retired units, or other models.
